summary: Phase 1 MVP smoke-tested end-to-end. Backend auth, dashboard KPIs, leads, clients, content, portal summary and client isolation all working. Frontend flows verified: admin login -> dashboard with correct KPIs & 2 Recharts; navigation to CRM/Clients/Content Studio; client detail with Content Studio Kanban rendering; WhatsApp link on client card; logout returns to /login; client portal login redirects to /portal with approve/adjust buttons present.
passed: Backend POST /api/auth/login (admin, Dr.Rafael, Aurora) - all return JWT token
Backend GET /api/dashboard/summary - KPIs: active_clients=3, mrr=13800, leads_open=7, contents_awaiting_approval=2 (matches spec)
Backend content isolation: Aurora user sees only 2 items with own client_id (Dr. Rafael's contents hidden)
Backend GET /api/portal/summary for client_admin (Dr.Rafael) returns client & content data
Frontend: Dashboard KPI cards render correct values (3, R$ 13.800,00, 7, 2)
Frontend: 2 Recharts SVGs render (Conteudos por status + Leads por etapa)
Frontend: CRM page loads with 'Novo lead' button visible (data-testid crm-new-lead-btn)
Frontend: Clients page renders 5 client cards with data-testid client-card-{id}
Frontend: WhatsApp wa.me anchor present on client card
Frontend: Client detail -> Content Studio tab renders content-kanban
Frontend: Client portal login (cliente@drrafael.com) redirects to /portal; portal-page renders with approve/adjust buttons
action_items: Minor (non-blocking) React hydration warning: <a> inside <a> descendant in Clients.jsx line ~60 (WhatsApp anchor nested inside a Link card). Consider replacing outer Link with div+onClick or moving WhatsApp button outside the Link wrapper to eliminate console error.

not_tested_deferred_to_full_qa: Actually creating a new lead via 'Novo lead' modal end-to-end
Moving lead across stages via 'Mover para' dropdown
Converting lead -> client and redirect to client detail
Creating new content, moving content status, 'Enviar ao cliente' -> aguardando_aprovacao
Portal approve flow with confirm dialog -> content=aprovado
Portal adjust flow with required comment -> ajuste_solicitado + version increment + history preserved
Session persistence after page refresh via localStorage vibrae_token
